name: application-intent-model
description: Eliminates AI hallucinations and logic drift by grounding code generation in versioned .aim files. AIM v5 treats each .aim file as a projection of a node-and-edge graph: typed edges — [verb](aim:#Facet:Name) — connect Views, Contracts, Flows, Schemas, and Events, and optional bindings map intent to code so review becomes a graph-diff. Roles: Architect, Developer, Reviewer — plus an Encoder that reverse-engineers existing systems into intent (§17). Any agent self-bootstraps from the spec: URL declared in AGENTS.md.
